Advanced — use a different tracking workbook

This tool already has the current workbook built in, so most of the time you can ignore this. To update a different workbook (for example a new pay period), choose its file here first.

Runs entirely on this computer — nothing is uploaded anywhere.
Open the downloaded file in Excel; totals refresh automatically.
